introSection: Unknown was a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Italian firm L&T Systems previously located at Boys Land in Khamis Mushait, 'Asir, Saudi Arabia.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The ride opened at Dreamland Margate in Margate, Kent, UK in 2001. It closed in 2003.

The ride opened at Digital World in Riyadh, Ar Riyadh, Saudi Arabia in 2004. It closed in 2017 or earlier.

fullText:
Unknown was a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Italian firm L&T Systems previously located at Boys Land in Khamis Mushait, 'Asir, Saudi Arabia.

The ride opened at Dreamland Margate in Margate, Kent, UK in 2001. It closed in 2003.

The ride opened at Digital World in Riyadh, Ar Riyadh, Saudi Arabia in 2004. It closed in 2017 or earlier.
